title: lastrea riparia
intro: Lastrea riparia, also known as the riparian lady fern, is a species of fern native to Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. Its extracts have shown to have health benefits such as reducing oxidative stress, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antimicrobial activity. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and applications.
